mapper.sql: select ft.transfer_id, ft.institution_id, ft.transfer_no, ft.transfer_type, ft.transfer_amount, ft.transfer_date, ft.transfer_period, ft.elder_count, ft.transfer_status, ft.bank_order_no, ft.failure_reason, ft.approve_user, ft.approve_time, ft.execute_user, ft.execute_time, ft.create_by, ft.create_time, ft.update_by, ft.update_time, ft.remark, ft.is_paid, ft.paid_time, ft.paid_method, ft.apply_id, ft.elder_id, ft.order_id, ft.billing_month, ft.status, pi.institution_name, ei.elder_name from fund_transfer ft left join pension_institution pi on ft.institution_id = pi.institution_id left join elder_info ei on ft.elder_id = ei.elder_id
mapper.select: where ft.institution_id = #{institutionId} order by ft.create_time desc
where ft.transfer_status = '0' and (ft.is_paid = '0' or ft.is_paid is null) and ft.status = 'pending' order by ft.billing_month asc

SELECT COUNT(*) as transfer_count, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '1' THEN transfer_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as success_amount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '2' THEN transfer_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as failed_amount, IFNULL(SUM(transfer_amount), 0) as total_amount, COUNT(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '1' THEN 1 END) as success_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN transfer_status = '2' THEN 1 END) as failed_count FROM fund_transfer WHERE 1=1 and institution_id = #{institutionId} and transfer_date >= #{startDate} and transfer_date <= #{endDate}
mapper.insert:
insert into fund_transfer
institution_id, transfer_no, transfer_type, transfer_amount, transfer_date, transfer_period, elder_count, transfer_status, bank_order_no, failure_reason, approve_user, approve_time, execute_user, execute_time, create_by, create_time, remark, is_paid, paid_time, paid_method, apply_id, elder_id, order_id, billing_month, status,
#{institutionId}, #{transferNo}, #{transferType}, #{transferAmount}, #{transferDate}, #{transferPeriod}, #{elderCount}, #{transferStatus}, #{bankOrderNo}, #{failureReason}, #{approveUser}, #{approveTime}, #{executeUser}, #{executeTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark}, #{isPaid}, #{paidTime}, #{paidMethod}, #{applyId}, #{elderId}, #{orderId}, #{billingMonth}, #{status},
mapper.delete:
delete from fund_transfer where transfer_id in
#{transferId}
